user_system_path: Guardian (workday-presence) seeds the matched draft at GENERATION TIME. When the daily brief persists a winning directive+artifact to tkg_actions, it also seeds workday_presence_state (with its draft) grounded to that exact winner — so the guardian's draft is deterministic, retiring the post-hoc fuzzy 48h recycle (#394) for the brief path (#394 stays as a fallback for other paths). Widens the one real act (hands), not a new brain (Bible Part II-B). Constraint: NO paid API calls to test — prove in the harness.
allowed_files_raw: Seam #397: the workday-presence seed lib + the seed-from-scorer route (extraction) + the daily-brief generate file (one additive seed call) + control-plane + docs. Schema and dependency files stay forbidden — no migrations, no new deps.
forbidden_files_raw: No schema (supabase/**) or dependency (package*.json) changes in this seam. Any lib/app path outside the allowed list is out of scope.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run lint && npm run build && focused vitest (seed-from-directive + seed-from-scorer route + recycled-draft + finished-work-gate)
required_browser_proof: DEFERRED — exercising the live seeded card requires a paid daily-brief generation cycle; owner directive forbids paid tests (Cost Doctrine). Harness proof is complete; the live path is reported unproven-by-paid, not claimed done.
browser_proof_command: N/A — no-paid directive; prove in harness
acceptance_condition: Seed lib extracted with byte-identical behavior (seed-from-scorer route suite green), daily-brief seeds workday_presence_state at the scored-winner persistence point (best-effort, snooze-preserving, refuses ungrounded send drafts), #394 recycle/finished-work suites stay green, and gate:continuity + lint + build pass.
anti_regression_checks: seed-from-scorer route suite green (extraction is behavior-preserving)
#394 recycled-draft + finished-work-gate suites green (recycle fallback intact)
no paid API calls in any test
an existing active snooze is preserved by the brief reseed (never wakes a silenced card)
no schema or dependency files changed
stop_condition: Stop when the seam is merged (MERGED_AND_CLOSED) with harness proof, or blocked with an exact receipt. The live user-facing path is explicitly deferred (no-paid directive) — not a blocker on the harness-proven change.
next_command: After #397 merges: configure the free external 15-min cron (owner-side firing cadence). Then optional code cleanups — malformed commitment titles, legacy cyan favicons, stale-branch/skipped-test triage.
